---
title: "Data Professionals Survey Report"
description: "The aims of this dashboard is to explore the dataprofessionals activity and their perceptions."
image: featured.png
image-height: "500"
image-width: "1200"
categories:
  - PowerBI Dashboard
  - Visualization
---


```{=html}
<iframe frameborder="0" scrolling="yes" seamless="seamless" style="display:block; width:100%; height:100vh;"src="https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=eyJrIjoiZWIyNWZmOWYtOTFiNi00MTVkLWFjMTAtOTU2OGJlOTJjYjcyIiwidCI6ImRmODY3OWNkLWE4MGUtNDVkOC05OWFjLWM4M2VkN2ZmOTVhMCJ9&pageName=ReportSection" title="Webpage example"></iframe>
```
